map_points.name: Saline Township campus (Stargate)
map_points.note: 250-acre build on 575-acre property. Full construction targeted early 2026.

map_points.name: Van Buren Township Google proposal
map_points.note: ~280 acres near Belleville. State wetland permit review pending.

map_points.name: Lyon Township Project Flex
map_points.note: ~172 acres, 1.8M sq ft. Alphabet-backed Sidewalk Infrastructure ties reported.

map_points.name: Southfield Metrobloks data center
map_points.note: ~110,000 sq ft near I-696. City council approved site plan Dec. 2025.

map_points.name: Allen Park Solstice proposal
map_points.note: Planning commission voted 7–2 against; city recommended 6-month pause.

map_points.name: Mason-area proposal
map_points.note: Developer requested city utilities; $1B investment pledged.

map_points.name: Howell Township Meta proposal
map_points.note: 1,000+ acre proposal withdrawn Dec. 2025 amid opposition.

map_points.name: Augusta Township Thor Equities
map_points.note: 522 acres rezoned within 810-acre site. Referendum expected 2026.

map_points.name: York Township Sansone / Toyota land
map_points.note: 412 acres off Platt Road. No formal township application yet.

map_points.name: Ypsilanti Township UM / Los Alamos facility
map_points.note: $1.2B high-performance computing facility. Township opposes Textile Road site.

map_points.name: Gaines Township Microsoft
map_points.note: 316-acre former Steelcase property. Rezoning hearing Dec. 2025.

map_points.name: Dorr Township Microsoft
map_points.note: 272 acres along U.S. 131. No formal plan filed.

map_points.name: Lowell Township Franklin Partners
map_points.note: 235-acre parcel. Tenant described as top-10 U.S. company.

map_points.name: Pavilion Township Franklin Partners
map_points.note: 265-acre industrial site. Request withdrawn after backlash.

map_points.name: Lansing Deep Green data center
map_points.note: $120M downtown project. Partners with BWL for district heat.

map_points.name: Frenchtown Township Project Cherry Blossom
map_points.note: 200-acre former golf course near I-75.

map_points.name: Dundee Township Project Ironwood
map_points.note: 350-acre site. Township has temporary moratorium.

map_points.name: Kalkaska County Rocklocker proposal
map_points.note: Proposal scrapped after community rejection.

map_points.name: Springfield Township 84-acre campus
map_points.note: 84-acre proposed campus triggered 180-day moratorium.

map_points.name: City of Northville moratorium
map_points.note: 12-month preemptive moratorium.

map_points.name: Springfield Township moratorium
map_points.note: 180-day moratorium.

map_points.name: City of Pontiac moratorium
map_points.note: 6-month moratorium.

map_points.name: City of Sterling Heights moratorium
map_points.note: 1-year moratorium.

map_points.name: City of Detroit moratorium (proposed)
map_points.note: Council voted 6–2 to request 2-year moratorium. Mayor convened working group.

map_points.name: Ypsilanti Township water moratorium
map_points.note: YCUA 12-month pause on water/sewer for new data centers.

map_points.name: City of Ypsilanti moratorium
map_points.note: 60-day emergency + 365-day resolution.

map_points.name: City of East Lansing moratorium
map_points.note: 6-month preemptive moratorium.

map_points.name: Armada Township moratorium
map_points.note: 180-day moratorium.

map_points.name: Dundee Township moratorium
map_points.note: 90-day moratorium, subsequently extended.

map_points.name: Grand Blanc Township moratorium
map_points.note: 1-year moratorium.

map_points.name: Green Charter Township moratorium
map_points.note: 1-year moratorium.

map_points.name: Hayes Township moratorium
map_points.note: 180-day moratorium.

map_points.name: Lenox Township moratorium
map_points.note: 4-month moratorium with extension option.

map_points.name: Lodi Township moratorium
map_points.note: 180-day moratorium.

map_points.name: Manchester Township moratorium
map_points.note: 2-year moratorium.

map_points.name: Pittsfield Township moratorium
map_points.note: 180-day moratorium.

map_points.name: City of Saginaw moratorium
map_points.note: 6-month moratorium, unanimous.

map_points.name: City of Saline moratorium
map_points.note: 12-month moratorium (city, separate from township campus).

map_points.name: City of South Lyon moratorium
map_points.note: 12-month moratorium.

map_points.name: Sylvan Township moratorium
map_points.note: 6-month moratorium.

map_points.name: City of Taylor moratorium
map_points.note: 1-year moratorium.

map_points.name: Tyrone Township moratorium
map_points.note: 6-month moratorium.

map_points.name: Ann Arbor Township moratorium
map_points.note: 12-month moratorium.

map_points.name: Erie Township moratorium
map_points.note: Limited moratorium.

map_points.name: Meridian Township moratorium
map_points.note: 6-month moratorium on data centers and battery storage.

map_points.name: Washington Township moratorium
map_points.note: 6-month moratorium.

map_points.name: Stronach Township moratorium
map_points.note: Six-month pause through Dec. 31, 2026.

map_points.name: Filer Township moratorium
map_points.note: One-year moratorium.

map_points.name: Big Rapids Township moratorium
map_points.note: One-year pause.

map_points.name: City of Wixom moratorium
map_points.note: Moving from moratorium to permanent zoning rules; June 29 hearing.

map_points.name: Delta County moratorium (draft)
map_points.note: Draft moratorium up to 12 months in legal review.

map_points.name: Michigan State Capitol rally
map_points.note: Bipartisan Capitol rally for statewide moratorium study.

map_points.name: MPSC Consumers Energy data center tariff
map_points.note: 100 MW large-load threshold for data center tariff.

map_points.name: ITC Oneida substation (start)
map_points.note: Western terminus of proposed 50-mile Oneida–Sabine Lake corridor.

map_points.name: ITC Sabine Lake substation (end)
map_points.note: Planned new substation northeast of Fowlerville.

map_points.name: Grand Ledge corridor area
map_points.note: Proposed routes pass just southwest of Grand Ledge.

map_points.name: Okemos listening session hub
map_points.note: Community listening sessions Jan. 26–27 at Okemos Event Center.

map_points.name: Wixom Planning Commission hearing
map_points.note: June 29 public hearing on permanent data center zoning rules.

map_points.name: Lyon Township board meeting
map_points.note: July 7 regular board meeting.

map_points.name: Pittsfield Planning Commission
map_points.note: July 7 planning commission — drafting data center ordinance.

map_points.name: Saline Township board meeting
map_points.note: July 8 board meeting — active construction updates possible.

map_points.name: Lenox Township board meeting
map_points.note: July 9 board meeting.

map_points.name: MPSC open meeting
map_points.note: July 10 open meeting — oversees large-load electric agreements.

map_points.name: Donald C. Cook Nuclear Plant
map_points.note: Two-unit PWR plant on Lake Michigan. Michigan's largest single-site nuclear generator.

map_points.name: Fermi 2 Nuclear Plant
map_points.note: Boiling-water reactor on Lake Erie. DTE studying uprates and potential Fermi 3.

map_points.name: Palisades Nuclear Plant
map_points.note: Shut down 2022; federal-backed restart underway — would be first U.S. reactor restart.

map_points.name: Monroe Power Plant
map_points.note: Four-unit coal plant on Lake Erie. Scheduled retirement 2032.

map_points.name: J.H. Campbell Generating Plant
map_points.note: Three-unit coal plant on Lake Michigan. Units 1–3 slated for closure.

map_points.name: Belle River Power Plant
map_points.note: Coal units with adjacent gas peakers. Repowering to natural gas planned.

map_points.name: Blue Water Energy Center
map_points.note: Combined-cycle gas plant online 2022. Replaced St. Clair coal units.

map_points.name: D.E. Karn Generating Complex
map_points.note: Gas and oil units on Saginaw Bay. Former coal units retired 2023.

map_points.name: Alpine Generating Facility
map_points.note: Northern Michigan combined-cycle plant serving co-op members.

map_points.name: Zeeland Generating Station
map_points.note: Replaced Holland's James De Young coal plant in West Michigan.

map_points.name: Dearborn Industrial Generation
map_points.note: Industrial cogeneration serving Ford Rouge complex and grid.

map_points.name: Ludington Pumped Storage Plant
map_points.note: World-class pumped storage on Lake Michigan. Major grid-balancing asset.

map_points.name: Gratiot Farms Wind Project
map_points.note: Among Michigan's largest wind farms. Part of Gratiot County wind belt.

map_points.name: Lake Winds Energy Park
map_points.note: 56 turbines near Lake Michigan. Consumers' first owned wind park.

map_points.name: Cross Winds Energy Park
map_points.note: Thumb-region wind farm. Part of DTE's 1 GW wind portfolio.

map_points.name: Apple Blossom Wind Farm
map_points.note: Thumb wind development in Michigan's highest-wind county.

map_points.name: Crescent Wind Farm
map_points.note: Southern Michigan wind. Online 2020.

map_points.name: Beebe Wind Farm
map_points.note: Community-scale wind in Gratiot County corridor.

map_points.name: River Bend Solar Park
map_points.note: Michigan's largest operating solar farm. ~1,800 acres.

map_points.name: Sauk Solar Park
map_points.note: Consumers' large-scale solar build in southern Michigan.

map_points.name: Muskegon Solar Energy Center
map_points.note: 250 MW project on former B.C. Cobb coal plant site.

map_points.name: Polaris Solar Park
map_points.note: Utility-scale solar in southern Michigan.

map_points.name: Ford Rouge Solar Array
map_points.note: Rooftop + carport solar at Rouge complex. Symbolic of industrial load shifting to renewables.

map_meta.tagline: The most complete public-source map of Michigan's data center build-out

map_stories.title: 50 miles of new power lines through Mid-Michigan
map_stories.summary: ITC Michigan is proposing a high-voltage line from Oneida Township to Sabine Lake near Fowlerville - crossing 15 townships.

map_stories.title: ~50 communities have hit pause
map_stories.summary: Temporary moratoria now cover an area comparable to Rhode Island.

map_stories.title: Saline Township: Michigan's first hyperscale build
map_stories.summary: Related Digital's 1.4 GW campus for Oracle and OpenAI broke ground in June 2026.

map_stories.title: Where Michigan's electricity actually comes from
map_stories.summary: Gas (41%), coal (23%), nuclear (21%), wind (8%), solar (2%). Data centers need to know what's on the grid.

transmission_lines.note: Preliminary route option. MPSC will select final path.

transmission_lines.note: BWL transmission reinforcement in Lansing area.

sponsors.subhead: Premium placement for law firms, utilities, economic development & civic orgs reaching communities tracking data centers.
